name: @plugger-open-code/claude-marketplace
description: OpenCode plugin bringing Claude Code marketplace ecosystem to OpenCode

scripts.build:tui: bun build src-tui/index.tsx --outfile dist-tui/index.js --target=bun --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external @opentui/solid --external @opentui/core --external solid-js --external solid-js/web
